data.title: NFT brand Doodles to launch Solana-based token called DOOD
data.description:
The maximum DOOD token supply sits at 10 billion, with its largest allocations going to the Doodles community and an ecosystem fund.

data.title: US Customs and Border Patrol expands Bitcoin mining machine seizures to MicroBT and Canaan units: Blockspace
data.description:
The move may be part of the Trump administration’s decision to onshore sensitive electronics industries and bolster domestic BTC mining.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/340756/border-patrol-expands-bitcoin-mining-machine-seizures-to-microbt-and-canaan-units-blockspace?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Plasma Raises $20M to Advance Bitcoin-Based Blockchain for Stablecoins
data.description:
The post Plasma Raises $20M to Advance Bitcoin-Based Blockchain for Stablecoins appeared first on Coinpedia Fintech News
In a latest development, Plasma, a crypto startup creating a Bitcoin-based blockchain for stablecoins, raised $20 million to advance its development. The funding, led by Framework Ventures, will help launch Plasma’s testnet and mainnet, and support its expansion into...
source: https://coinpedia.org/news/plasma-raises-20m-to-advance-bitcoin-based-blockchain-for-stablecoins/

data.title: BNB Drops Below 660 USDT with a 1.59% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Feb 13, 2025, 17:20 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has dropped below 660 USDT and is now trading at 659.77002 USDT, with a narrowed 1.59% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Defi.App Completes $4 Million Funding, Mechanism Capital Leads Investment
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News DeFi trading platform Defi.App announced that it has completed $4 million in financing, of which venture capital institutions contributed $2 million, led by Mechanism Capital, DCF Capital Partners, Balaji Srinivasan and Pentoshi. It is reported that later this month, Defi.App plans to conduct a public token sale to non-US KYC users. (TheBlock)

data.title: doodles announces the launch of its official token $DOOD
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: NFT project doodles announced the launch of its official token $DOOD on the X platform. The token will be launched on Solana with a supply of 10,000,000,000. In the future, a bridge will be established with Base, and 68% will be allocated to the community.
